batch_summary: Deed [326] — Heirship Affidavit for Marguerite Bounds (FC OR/938/719, Doc# 4071, filed 8/25/1994). Affiants E. A. Strange Jr and James Black attest to heirs of Marguerite Bounds (d. 4/20/1981, Wortham, Freestone County, age 76): two children (Hallye Rae Bounds Tyner, Billy Joe Bounds [d. 3/28/1993 Falls Co.]), four grandchildren (Joe Edgar Bounds, Patricia Bounds Vogel, Bonnie Jean Bounds Reeves, Mitzi Dee Tyner). No property described — heirship documentation only, no conveyance, no mineral information. ISSUE-43 item 7 pulled. Does NOT advance ISSUE-16: Marguerite Bounds' connection to project Bounds family is not established by this instrument.

operations.content: 13. `1994-08-02_[326]_f` — E. A. Strange Jr + James Black (affiants) → Public (heirship affidavit, Freestone) — establishes heirs of **Marguerite Bounds** (d. 4/20/1981, Wortham, Freestone County, age 76). Survived by two children: (a) Hallye Rae Bounds Tyner (Tyler, Smith County, TX), (b) Billy Joe Bounds (Wortham, Freestone County, TX; d. 3/28/1993, Falls County, TX). Billy Joe's three children: Joe Edgar Bounds (m. Nancy Bounds), Patricia Bounds Vogel (m. Harvey Vogel), Bonnie Jean Bounds Reeves (m. Norman Reeves). Hallye Rae's one daughter: Mitzi Dee Tyner (femme sole). All four grandchildren survived Billy Joe and are living as of 1994. **No property described** — heirship documentation only; no conveyance. Affiants were "well acquainted with Marguerite Bounds prior to her death and those heirs surviving her." Attorney file ref: JWT/rw:94-21101.a21. Notaries: Deborah Goodrich (Strange, 8/2/1994, comm. exp. 12/10/96) and Glenda R. O'Neal (Black, 8/3/1994, comm. exp. 1/31/97). FC Vol. 0938, Pg. 719–720, Doc# 4071, annotation 94-0167. Filed Aug 25, 1994 at 3:40 PM; Mary Lynn White, Clerk County Court, Freestone County; Deputy: Danna House. **Affiant connection**: "James Black" may be James Allen Black (b. 10/6/1943, age 50 in 1994) — HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED. **Strange family connection**: E. A. Strange Jr is likely related to Rebecca Strange (notary on deed [323], 1984, comm. exp. 2/5/1985) — same Wortham/FC community. **Marguerite Bounds' genealogical connection** to project Bounds family (MS Bounds/Thomas Allen line or Jesse M. Bounds/Thomas Duncan Jr. line) is NOT established by this instrument. ISSUE-43 item 7. ISSUE-16 context (no advancement — no property, no Lou connection).

Affiants E. A. Strange Jr and James Black attest to Marguerite Bounds' heirs (d. 4/20/1981, Wortham, FC, age 76): children Hallye Rae Bounds Tyner and Billy Joe Bounds (d. 3/28/1993 Falls Co.); four grandchildren. **No property described** — heirship documentation only; does NOT advance ISSUE-16 (no mention of Lou, Jesse M.
